---
title: "Frances Dorothy Moor"
---

## Frances Dorothy Moor

**Dates:** (1825-1913)

**Maiden name:** (Grimston)

### Description

wife of the Rev. John Frewen Moor, jr.

### Biography

She married (1853) the Rev. John Frewen Moor, jr., Vicar of Ampfield. [<i>Erminois</i>].  Through her mother Jane Trench she was a first cousin of Maria (Trench) Wilson, the wife of the Rev. Robert Wilson, vicar of Rownhams.

### Letters

- Letter from April 19th [mid 1880s?]
- Letter from March 24th 1874
- Letter from Novr 4th [1869?]
- Letter from Oct 26th 1868
- Letter from Innocents’ day [28 December 1866]
- Letter from April 10th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
